text: Being here, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. Glass walls separate me from a space dedicated to research and development—R+D—as if inviting me to cross a threshold into discovery. The angled perspective disturbs my equilibrium, echoing the feeling that knowledge is never found when standing straight but rather by tilting my assumptions. The exhibit within promises ideas about how humans and machines coexist, stirring both hope and caution in me.
